title: Boat Rental in Sitges: A Budget Guide for 2026
html:
Renting a boat in Sitges on a budget is straightforward, with shared tours from €50 per person and self-drive motorboats from €200 for a half-day. Depart from any of the local marinas along the Garraf coast. BoatHire24 connects you with verified owners offering competitive prices across the Mediterranean.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Sitges?

Prices start at €50 per person for shared tours and rise to €1,500 for a full-day crewed yacht. A half-day self-drive motorboat (up to 8 guests) costs around €200, €400, while a catamaran for up to 12 guests runs €600, €900 per day. For the best value, book through yacht charter in Sitges options on BoatHire24, which include insurance and safety equipment. Crewed yachts typically include skipper fees; always check the listing for fuel costs. You can yacht charter in Sitges for your chosen dates.

Where to set off in Sitges

Most boat rentals depart from Port d'Aiguadolç, the main marina with over 400 berths, or Club Nàutic Sitges, a smaller harbour near the promenade. For longer trips, head to Port Ginesta, one of the largest marinas on the Catalan coast, located just 5 nautical miles north. Nearby anchorages include Cala de la Mota and the secluded cove of Cala Morisca. Popular day trips go to the town of Vilanova i la Geltrú or the Garraf Natural Park coast. One option worth a look is the Tranquility charter page.

Which boat to rent

  1. Small motorboat (4, 6 guests) Ideal for couples or small groups exploring nearby coves; from €200 half-day.
  2. Catamaran (8, 12 guests) Stable and spacious for families or parties; from €600 full-day.
  3. Rigid inflatable boat (RIB, 6, 8 guests) Fast and fun for watersports; from €300 half-day.
  4. Crewed sailing yacht (6, 10 guests) Classic experience with a skipper; from €800 full-day.
  5. Luxury motor yacht (8, 12 guests) Like the Azimut or Fairline models, for premium cruising; from €1,200 full-day. For a detailed example, see the Tranquility charter page on BoatHire24.

Cost breakdown

  • Shared tour: €50, €80 per person, 2, 3 hours, includes guide.
  • Small motorboat half-day: €200, €400 for up to 6 guests, without skipper.
  • Catamaran full-day: €600, €900 for up to 12 guests, often with skipper.
  • Crewed yacht full-day: €800, €1,500 for up to 10 guests, includes skipper and fuel.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Sitges?

Renters without a licence can operate small motorboats up to a certain power limit, but exact requirements depend on the boat and operator. In Spain, a 'Carta Náutica' is needed for larger vessels, but many Sitges rentals include a skipper who handles navigation. The operator confirms exact requirements when booking, so ask before you pay. Peak season runs from late June to early September, when the local wind, the Garbí, can pick up in the afternoons. If you own a boat, you can become a host and earn from spare days.

A local tip: book a morning time slot to avoid the afternoon Garbí wind, which can make conditions choppy, especially in open waters outside the Garraf coast.

At a glance

  • Price band: €50, €1,500 per outing
  • Peak months: July, August
  • Trip length: 2 hours to full day
  • Guest capacity: 4, 12 guests
  • Currency: EUR
  • Departure points: Port d'Aiguadolç, Club Nàutic Sitges, Port Ginesta

Questions about boat rental in Sitges

Can I rent a boat in Sitges without a licence?

Yes, many rentals offer boats that do not require a licence, provided they are under a certain power limit, or they include a skipper.

What is the best time of year to rent a boat in Sitges?

The best time is from June to September, when the weather is warm and the sea is calmest, though July and August are busiest and most expensive.

How far is it from Sitges to Barcelona by boat?

The distance is about 30 nautical miles, which takes roughly 1.5 hours in a motorboat, a popular day trip for experienced renters.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Sitges or list your own. Whether you are visiting for a day or planning a longer stay, the platform makes it simple to compare options and become a host if you own a boat in the area. The 2026 season promises great value for budget-conscious sailors.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Sitges and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
